The '''XJ6 X-wing starfighter''' was a variant of the classic [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] produced by [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]]. In service with the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet|Galactic Alliance Navy]] as of [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], it saw action in the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Hardpoint Squadron]] of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] used these models exclusively.

{{Ship-stub}}
